title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 524.210 - Plaintiff to make deed, when
text:
524.210.  Plaintiff to make deed, when. — In all cases where the occupying claimant shall be adjudged to take the land and pay the value thereof, the plaintiff shall, on payment of the money, make to the occupying claimant a conveyance thereof, with general warranty.
(RSMo 1939 § 1553) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1389; 1919 § 1839; 1909 § 2406
